_comment: House defaults — your org's standard stack. On first run the server copies this to house-defaults.json in the persistent data volume (so updates never overwrite it); edit THAT file to change your standard. New projects pre-seed their architecture decisions from here, and every value is editable per project in the wizard. Set choices to '' to ship no opinion.

decisions.why: Relational integrity + native vector search (pgvector) in one engine; runs as a container beside the app — full data ownership, no managed-service lock-in, portable to any host.

decisions.choice: OIDC SSO (Entra ID / Microsoft 365) + app-minted JWT in httpOnly cookie
decisions.why: Reuse the org identity provider for true SSO/MFA; the app mints its own short-lived session cookie — no third-party hosted-auth vendor or per-seat cost.

decisions.choice: Docker Compose behind Traefik on the LAN (images built on host)
decisions.why: Self-hosted, one-command deploy on owned infrastructure; no managed-runtime lock-in or egress cost — revisit if uptime/scale exceeds a single host.
Apps pull DATABASE_URL/secrets via a machine identity at deploy/runtime; nothing committed to source; one place to rotate.
